task: Expose structured descriptor JSON on the common-indicator fixture.
notes: Primary guard for descriptor JSON shape on the smallest verified fixture.

task: Carry descriptor JSON into semantic-form output on the common-print-form fixture.
notes: Keeps descriptor JSON consistent across inspect and semantic-model surfaces.

task: Keep the inspect CLI descriptor JSON export healthy on common-print-form.
verification: bash -lc 'uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); form=next(record for record in data[\"records\"] if record[\"kind\"] == \"descriptor\" and record[\"label\"] == \"form\"); module=next(record for record in data[\"records\"] if record[\"kind\"] == \"descriptor\" and record[\"label\"] == \"module\"); assert form[\"descriptor_json\"][\"format\"] == \"u64-pair-utf16le-v1\"; assert form[\"descriptor_json\"][\"name_utf16le\"] == \"form\"; assert module[\"descriptor_json\"][\"name_utf16le\"] == \"module\"; assert module[\"descriptor_json\"][\"u64_values_match\"] is True"'
notes: End-to-end CLI guard for descriptor JSON.

task: Keep unpack/pack lossless while descriptor JSON support is added.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" && uv run formbin pack "$tmpdir/unpack" -o "$tmpdir/repacked.Form.bin" && cmp -s tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin "$tmpdir/repacked.Form.bin"'
notes: Prevents descriptor JSON work from breaking the raw-first codec.
